title: Null target reference in PickupItemSystem
cause: A `PickupItemComponent` was created without using the constructors that set `targetRef` — e.g. spawned or loaded from data via the codec directly, or a plugin passed a null value.
recommendation: Ensure `PickupItemComponent` is always created via its constructor, never assembled manually from codec data. If you can't control the source, install HyFixes as a mitigation.

title: Null role parameters for spawn beacon
cause: `getRandomSpawn()` returned null — spawn beacons in volcanic/cave biomes can have misconfigured or missing spawn types.
recommendation: Check your spawn beacon configuration for missing spawn type entries in volcanic or cave biome definitions.

title: Duplicate block component registration
cause: A duplicate block component was detected and the engine throws instead of handling it gracefully.
recommendation: Avoid registering the same block component twice on one block entity. If this comes from a third-party plugin conflict, check for overlapping block component registrations.

title: Player already exists in destination world
cause: Race condition — a player entered an instance portal but hadn't been fully removed from their previous world yet. `InstancesPlugin` uses async CompletableFuture code with a drain/add race.
recommendation: If writing custom portal/instance logic, ensure the player is fully drained from the source world before adding to the destination world. Avoid parallel add/remove calls on the same player.

title: Silent interaction sync data loss
cause: Packets arriving out of order cause a negative index after offset adjustment; the engine silently drops the sync data instead of erroring, breaking combat, food consumption, and tool interactions without a visible crash.
recommendation: If players report combat/eating/tool actions silently failing under load, check server logs for repeated `[InteractionChain] Attempted to store sync data` warnings. This is a known engine issue with no plugin-level fix yet.

title: Duplicate plugin JARs detected
cause: Two copies of the same plugin file are present, usually from an update that didn't remove the old version.
recommendation: Check your mods/plugins directory for duplicate JAR files with different version suffixes and remove the outdated one.

exceptionType: varies (ClassNotFoundException or plugin fails to enable)
title: Missing plugin dependency
cause: A plugin requires another mod as a dependency that isn't installed.
recommendation: Check the plugin's documentation or `plugin.json` for a `depends` field and install all listed dependencies in the same mods directory.

title: I18n missing localization data
cause: The system locale is not set to English (US); the current Hytale build fails to load localization data for non-English system languages, breaking the Asset Editor.
recommendation: Change your OS system language to English (US) and restart before opening the Asset Editor. This affects Windows and Linux Hytale setups.
